statement.markdown: Given a MongoDB collection and a query object, implement a function to project only the specified fields from the collection. The function should return an array of objects, where each object represents a document in the collection with only the specified fields.
statement.inputFormat: The input will be an object with a `collection` property (an array of objects) and a `query` object with a `projection` property (an object specifying the fields to project).
statement.outputFormat: The output should be an array of objects, where each object represents a document in the collection with only the specified fields.
statement.notes: Assume the collection is an array of objects, where each object represents a document in the collection.

constraints.description: Number of documents in the collection

examples.input: { collection: [ { _id: 1, name: 'John', age: 30 }, { _id: 2, name: 'Jane', age: 25 } ], query: { projection: { name: 1, age: 1 } } }
examples.explanation: Project only the `name` and `age` fields from the collection.

hints.text: Check the MongoDB query projection syntax.

editorial.title: Editorial
editorial.intuition: To project only the specified fields, use the `$project` operator in MongoDB.
editorial.bruteForce: You can manually iterate over each document in the collection and create a new object with only the specified fields.
editorial.betterSolution: Use the `$project` operator with the `projection` object to project only the specified fields.
editorial.optimalSolution: Use the `$project` operator with the `projection` object and iterate over the documents in the collection using a `map` function.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: Verify that the output matches the expected output for each test case.
editorial.dryRun: Manually run the query with the specified projection to verify the output.

testCases.input: { collection: [ { _id: 1, name: 'John', age: 30 }, { _id: 2, name: 'Jane', age: 25 } ], query: { projection: { name: 1, age: 1 } } }
{ collection: [ { _id: 1, name: 'John', age: 30 }, { _id: 2, name: 'Jane', age: 25 } ], query: { projection: { name: 1, age: 1 } } }
